message:
feat: wire scale up/down controls in WorkloadDeployment card (#3587)

* feat: wire scale up/down controls in WorkloadDeployment card

Implement real workload scaling across the stack:
- Backend: ScaleWorkload in pkg/k8s/workload.go now uses the k8s
  dynamic client to update replicas on Deployments and StatefulSets
  across target clusters in parallel
- Agent: New /scale HTTP endpoint provides a fallback when the
  backend REST API is unavailable
- Frontend: The +/- replica controls in the WorkloadDeployment card
  now call the backend (with agent fallback), show loading/success/
  error states, and an Apply button that appears when replicas differ
- Test: Updated TestScaleWorkload with proper spec fixture

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>

* 🐛 address code review: fix agent response parsing, multi-cluster fallback, AbortError handling, timeout constant, comment and var rename, test assertion

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>

Co-authored-by: clubanderson <407614+clubanderson@users.noreply.github.com>
Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kubestellar/console/sessions/c8a35760-1194-4536-95f0-955ce72277d5

* 🐛 include cluster name in agent fallback error messages for better debuggability

Signed-off-by: Copilot <copilot@github.com>
